title: Leviathan: the verifier is no longer a judge, but a jury member
description: The autonomous daemon no longer slashes alone. It casts a bonded verdict; conviction lands only when enough independent verifiers agree.

title: Leviathan: the cheat-catching machine is live
description: The verifier daemon now detects fraudulent gradients on live Solana devnet and writes the slash on-chain itself. One process, end to end, with a permanent proof transaction.

title: Fusing detection and conviction into one verifier daemon
description: leviathan-verifier-daemon closes the loop in one always-on process: read the coordinator, audit committed work against an honest reference, and slash on fraud with live roster indexing.
